raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of box_1 and is reachable from above by the left arm; there is enough clearance to press down on box_2 without slipping off the stack edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent the top box from lifting, shifting, or tipping while box_1 is being separated and lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of box_1; the claws can open wide enough to pinch the 30 cm box; box_2 is stabilized so the 'attached_to' interface does not cause the stack to move unpredictably during grasp establishment.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped from both sides by the two claws while box_2 remains stabilized on top."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already grasped; box_2 remains stabilized; there is free space around the base of the stack so box_1 can be gently wiggled/slid to break the attachment without colliding with the table edges or causing box_2 to topple.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is loosened/broken such that box_1 can be lifted independently without lifting box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The attachment is loosened and box_1 is free to move; box_2 is still stabilized to avoid sticking and lifting with box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is fully under control of the robot with a stable dual-arm grasp and is ready to be lifted off the tabletop."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1 and is reachable from above by the left arm; there is enough clearance to press down on box_2 without slipping off the stack edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent the top box from lifting, shifting, or tipping while box_1 is being separated and lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of box_1; the claws can open wide enough to pinch the 30 cm box; box_2 is stabilized so the 'attached_to' interface does not cause the stack to move unpredictably during grasp establishment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped from both sides by the two claws while box_2 remains stabilized on top.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already grasped; box_2 remains stabilized; there is free space around the base of the stack so box_1 can be gently wiggled/slid to break the attachment without colliding with the table edges or causing box_2 to topple.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_1 and box_2 is loosened/broken such that box_1 can be lifted independently without lifting box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The attachment is loosened and box_1 is free to move; box_2 is still stabilized to avoid sticking and lifting with box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is fully under control of the robot with a stable dual-arm grasp and is ready to be lifted off the tabletop.
